result.summary: Discussion about migrating to Kubernetes, optimizing database and setting up monitoring with Prometheus + Grafana.

tasks.task: Complete migration of staging environment with Helm charts
Set up Prometheus + Grafana stack and write alerts for CPU, memory, and latency p99
Optimize database by rewriting ORM queries to raw SQL with JOIN-s, adding indices on transactions and user_sessions tables, and performing load testing after changes

decisions: Transition to GitOps workflow through ArgoCD
Use HashiCorp Vault instead of .env files for storing secrets
Minimum test coverage for new services is 80%
All Docker images will be multi-stage builds for size reduction.
